name: @brain/evidence-gateway
description: Dormant AI Brain Evidence Gateway: the write-side composition root defining the deterministic ingestion pipeline (receive → validate → normalize → deduplicate → prepare confidence/memory/audit/exposure). Pure placeholder stages; no work, no persistence. The normalize stage wires (still dormant) to @brain/evidence-normalization (deferred ApplicationPlan, M55–M56); the deduplicate stage derives dormant dedupe/provenance/confidence-reweight proposals, reusing @brain/evidence-weighting (M57–M59). Depends only on @brain/evidence-contracts + @brain/evidence-store + @brain/evidence-normalization + @brain/evidence-weighting.
